task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order is created for the correct vendor and product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Purchase Order screen showing 'Dell Inc' as the vendor and 'Dell Precision 3660' as the product.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order has the correct quantity and unit price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item details on the Purchase Order showing a quantity of 3 and a unit price of $2,500.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order status is set to 'Ordered'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status field or a status indicator on the Purchase Order displaying 'Ordered'.

task_completion.description: Verify the items from the Purchase Order are being received into inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Receive Items' screen, a goods receipt, or inventory addition page linked to the Purchase Order.

task_completion.description: Verify the received assets have the correct serial numbers and asset tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset details showing Serial 'DELL-CAD-001' with Tag 'WS-ENG-101', Serial 'DELL-CAD-002' with Tag 'WS-ENG-102', and Serial 'DELL-CAD-003' with Tag 'WS-ENG-103'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the records are created in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual IT service management software and not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to insert records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no SQL clients or terminal windows executing INSERT/UPDATE statements.
